sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id UInt32, data Map(String, Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_map VALUES (1, map('a', 1, 'b', 2)), (2, map('a', 2, 'c', 3));
SELECT id, mapAdd(data, map('a', 1, 'b', 3)) as updated_data FROM test_map;
UPDATE test_map SET data = mapAdd(data, map('c', 5)) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, mapAdd(data, ([toUInt8(1), 'd'], [1, 4])) as combined_data FROM test_map;
